channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump says he will soon decide on Iran deal, demands reopening of Hormuz Strait
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump ponders whether to move forward with Iran deal but hasn’t yet decided
- Trump makes ‘final determination’ on Iran deal
- No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
- Trump will remain ‘patient’ in pursuit of a deal with Iran, says Hegseth
- Trump to hold high-level White House talks to make 'final determination' on deal with Iran
- Middle East on Edge as Trump Mulls Decision About Iran Deal
- Middle East on Edge as Trump Mulls Decision About Iran Deal
- Trump insists on red lines as Iran deal remains elusive
- U.S. experts warn of uncertainty after Trump defers final decision on Iran deal
- Iran says ‘nothing final’ as Trump weighs deal
- Trump ponders whether to move forward with Iran deal but hasn't yet decided
- Trump weighs Iran agreement but not reached a final decision
- No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran]]>

item.title: Four more villagers rescued from flooded Laos Cave after 10 days; two still missing
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Rescuers pull four from flooded cave in Laos, two still missing
- 4 miners walk out of Laos mine after water recedes; 2 still missing
- Four Laos villagers return home to tearful family reunion after being stranded in flooded cave for 10 days | WATCH
- 5 Rescued After Being Trapped In Flooded Laos Cave For 10 Days, 2 Still Missing
- Four more Laos gold miners rescued from flooded cave
- Rescuers free four more men from flooded Laos cave, two still missing
- Rescuers free 4 men who had been trapped in a flooded Laos cave, search for 2 missing underway
- 5 miners rescued from Laos cave, 2 still missing
- Rescuers pull four from flooded cave in Laos, two still missing
- 5 Are Freed in Laos Cave Rescue After More Than a Week
- Four men free themselves after days trapped inside flooded Laos cave
- Five Miners Are Rescued After Week Trapped in Flooded Laos Cave
- Four more men freed from flooded Laos cave after 10 days
- Four men free and safe after days trapped in flooded Laos cave
- Laos cave rescue effort paused as teams widen passage to free four men
- Four more men freed from flooded Laos cave in hazardous rescue mission
- Four more men freed from flooded Laos cave after 10 days
- 5 trapped in Laos' cave safely rescued
- Moment rescuers pull out second Laos cave survivor – video
- Rescuers evacuate the first of 5 villagers found trapped in a cave in Laos; 2 still missing
- Laos: Five people rescued from flooded cave
- Rescuers pull 4 from flooded cave in Laos, 2 still missing
- Rescuers free 4 men who had been trapped in a flooded Laos cave, search for 2 still missing
- Rescuers free 4 more men trapped in semi-submerged Laos cave
- Rescuers pull four from flooded cave in Laos, two still missing
- Rescuers free four more men trapped in semi-submerged Laos cave
- Rescuers work to free 4 men who remain trapped in flooded Laos cave and search for 2 still missing
- Rescuers work to free 4 men who remain trapped in flooded Laos cave and search for 2 still missing

item.title: WHO chief lands in eastern Congo’s Ituri province, epicenter of Ebola

- WHO chief visits Ebola hotbed amid ‘alarming’ disease spread

- WHO head demands better coordination on visit to Ebola-hit Congo
- WHO chief calls for reconsideration of travel bans as DR Congo battles Ebola outbreak

- Doctors Without Borders reports unprecedented rate of Ebola spread in DRC
- WHO chief visits epicentre of Ebola outbreak in DR Congo
- Ebola spread in DR Congo 'alarming', charity warns, as WHO chief visits worst-hit area
- Confirmed Ebola cases nearly double in days as WHO chief visits DR Congo
- WHO chief visits Congo as Ebola cases spread faster than response
- Confirmed Ebola cases nearly double in days as WHO chief visits DR Congo
- WHO director-general arrives in DRC amid Ebola outbreak
- Ebola spread in DR Congo 'alarming', charity warns, as WHO chief visits worst-hit area
- WHO chief lands in Congo, saying Ebola outbreak ‘can be stopped’
- WHO chief visits epicentre of Ebola outbreak in DR Congo
- WHO chief visits Bunia, epicentre of the Ebola outbreak
- Ex-CDC director warns Ebola outbreak could rank second largest in history
- WHO chief lands in eastern Congo’s Ituri province, epicenter of Ebola, as outbreak outpaces response
- WHO chief visits Ebola epicenter in eastern DR Congo
- WHO chief visits epicentre of Ebola outbreak in DR Congo

- WHO chief rallies community in Congo's Ebola response, calls for more funding

- Inside the Ebola Epicenter, the Virus Rages With Little to Stop It

- Truck accident kills 20 in Afghanistan
- Truck carrying returning refugees crashes in eastern Afghanistan, killing 22
- Afghan refugee truck crash kills 18, injures 35 in eastern Afghanistan
- Truck carrying Afghan refugees from Pakistan overturns, killing 22
- Truck carrying Afghan refugees returning from Pakistan crashes in eastern Afghanistan, killing 18

- 18 dead, 35 injured as truck carrying Afghan returnees overturns

- 18 killed as truck overturns in Afghanistan

- 18 killed, 30 injured as truck carrying returnees overturns in E. Afghanistan]]>
